response.justification: While James is a highly experienced and skilled software engineer with commendable entrepreneurial initiative and a broad technical background, his profile does not align with the Director-level seniority and strategic focus of this Principal Engineer role. His career has centered on hands-on development in Senior and Staff positions, lacking demonstrated experience in defining high-level AI strategy, advising enterprise customers, or operating at the level of influence required. His recent work in AI is promising but does not meet the 'recognized expertise' criterion for a role centered on AI platform strategy.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience (18+ years) across a wide variety of languages and platforms.
Demonstrates entrepreneurial spirit and product ownership through founding GISCollective.
Actively engages the tech community through talks, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Significant seniority mismatch; experience is at the Staff/Senior level, not the required Director-level.
Lacks demonstrated experience in high-level product strategy, planning, and customer advisement.
AI/ML experience is very recent and not the primary focus of his career, falling short of 'recognized expertise'.
